summary: Extra‑crispy soundboard capture of the magical last show of Spring ’77, highlighted by a fresh Sugar Magnolia and soaring Jerry Garcia solos.
review: The recording is praised as crystal‑clear, “extra crispy” and virtually flawless, delivering the energy of a live audience without any audible crowd bleed.  Fans rate the performance as an A+‑level show—one of the top Spring ’77 dates—with standout moments on Sugar Magnolia, Sunshine Daydream and Samson & Delilah, and a consistently high‑energy set flow.

ai_rating.rationale: All nine substantive reviews give five stars and uniformly praise both the musical performance and the pristine soundboard source, resulting in an exceptionally high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Repeated mentions of ‘extra crispy’, ‘finest’, ‘cleaned‑up shape’ and no complaints about dropouts or muddiness indicate a pristine, well‑balanced soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the set as a seamless, high‑energy flow that captures the magic of the tour’s final show, with strong transitions and an uplifting encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for his tone, note‑emphasis changes, and overall magical presence on guitar.
